chapter_title.en: Chapter on Prohibition of Shedding Blood and Taking Wealth Unlawfully, the Prohibition of Engaging in the Impermissible, and Repentance From Killing Whether Intentional or Accidental

text: : "إِنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَقَفَ بِمِنًى حِينَ قَضَى مَنَاسِكَهُ فِي حَجَّةِ اَلْوَدَاعِ فَقَالَ "أَيُّهَا اَلنَّاسُ اِسْمَعُوا مَا أَقُولُ لَكُمْ وَ اِعْقِلُوهُ فَإِنِّي لاَ أَدْرِي لَعَلِّي لاَ أَلْقَاكُمْ فِي هَذَا اَلْمَوْقِفِ بَعْدَ عَامِنَا هَذَا" ثُمَّ قَالَ "أَيُّ يَوْمٍ أَعْظَمُ حُرْمَةً" قَالُوا هَذَا اَلْيَوْمُ قَالَ "فَأَيُّ شَهْرٍ أَعْظَمُ حُرْمَةً" قَالُوا هَذَا اَلشَّهْرُ قَالَ "فَأَيُّ بَلْدَةٍ أَعْظَمُ حُرْمَةً" قَالُوا هَذِهِ اَلْبَلْدَةُ قَالَ "فَإِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ وَ أَمْوَالَكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ حَرَامٌ كَحُرْمَةِ يَوْمِكُمْ هَذَا فِي شَهْرِكُمْ هَذَا فِي بَلَدِكُمْ هَذَا إِلَى يَوْمِ تَلْقَوْنَهُ فَيَسْأَلُكُمْ عَنْ أَعْمَالِكُمْ أَلاَ هَلْ بَلَّغْتُ" قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَالَ "اَللَّهُمَّ اِشْهَدْ أَلاَ وَ مَنْ كَانَتْ عِنْدَهُ أَمَانَةٌ فَلْيُؤَدِّهَا إِلَى مَنِ اِئْتَمَنَهُ عَلَيْهَا فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَحِلُّ لَهُ دَمُ اِمْرِئٍ مُسْلِمٍ وَ لاَ مَالُهُ إِلاَّ بِطِيبَةِ نَفْسِهِ فَلاَ تَظْلِمُوا أَنْفُسَكُمْ وَ لاَ تَرْجِعُوا بَعْدِي كُفَّاراً" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5151 - Zurah narrated from Samaah from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Indeed, the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) stood at Mina after completing his rituals during the Farewell Pilgrimage and said:
'O' people, listen to what I (sw) say to you and understand it, for I (sw) do not know, perhaps I (sw) will not meet you again in this place after this year.'
Then Prophet (sw) said: 'Which day is the most sacred?' They replied: 'This day.'
Prophet (sw) said: 'Which month is the most sacred?' They replied: 'This month.'
Prophet (sw) said: 'Which land is the most sacred?'
They replied: 'This land.'
Prophet (sw) then said: 'Indeed, your blood and your wealth are sacred upon you, just as the sanctity of this day of yours in this month of yours in this land of yours, until the day you meet Him (swt), and He (swt) will question you about your deeds. Behold! Have I (sw) conveyed?'
They replied: 'Yes.'
Prophet (sw) said: 'O' Allah (swt), bear witness. Indeed, whoever has a trust in his possession, let him return it to the one who entrusted him with it, for it is not permissible for anyone to shed the blood of a Muslim or take his wealth except with his willing consent. So, do not wrong yourselves, and do not turn back as disbelievers after Me (sw).'"
